cause_description: Transformer failed due to insulation breakdown after 28 years of service. Post-incident analysis confirmed moisture ingress through degraded bushing seal.
resolution_description: Damaged conductors reconductored over two-day planned outage window. Hot-line clamp used to restore partial supply ahead of full conductor replacement.

cause_description: Underground cable fault detected at 2.3 km from substation. TDR testing localised fault to road crossing duct section.
resolution_description: Fault located using TDR and cable sectionalisation. Failed joint excavated and replaced with factory-made joint kit. Pressure test passed.

cause_description: Switchgear flashover triggered by contaminated busbar surface. Atmospheric salt pollution elevated following coastal storm event.
resolution_description: Manual switching restored supply from alternative source. Defective equipment isolated and locked out pending engineering assessment.
